channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Milton destroys the roof of the Rays' stadium, littering the field below with debris
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — The roof panels over the home of baseball's Tampa Bay Rays were ripped to shreds by the force of Hurricane Milton, with debris littering the field and much of the seating areas Thursday after the deadly storm barreled across the state.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Betts and Ohtani help the Dodgers stay alive in NLDS with 8-0 win vs the Padres
item.description: Mookie Betts homered for the second straight night, Shohei Ohtani hit an RBI single and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat Dylan Cease and the San Diego Padres 8-0 to force a deciding Game 5 in their tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Bernie Wilson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake ready for road test: Unbeaten streak at stake against San Jose Earthquakes
item.description: Real Salt Lake (4th place Western Conference, 53 points) kept a clean sheet at home against Minnesota on Wednesday and now head back on the road with a four-match unbeaten streak to face the San Jose Earthquakes (14th place, Western Conference, 21 points) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Who plays for the Los Angeles Clippers this year? Here's a breakdown of the roster
item.description: Yet another NBA offseason has come and gone, with some major free agent signings taking place and some big names being selected in this year’s draft.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Greg Landry, former Detroit Lions quarterback and assistant coach, dead at 77
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Greg Landry, the former Detroit Lions quarterback and assistant coach, has died. He was 77. The Lions announced Landry's death on social media Friday. No cause of death was given.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cal WBB player makes a splash with sneaker design
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (KRON) -- Hooper by day, artist by night. That's life for Cal Berkeley women's basketball player Jayda Noble. The senior guard has balanced her nonstop basketball schedule with her other passion -- sneaker design.
item.dc:creator: Jason Dumas, KRON4

item.title: Bowles says the Buccaneers will learn from their mistakes in overtime loss to division-rival Falcons
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have no one to blame but themselves for failing to take advantage of an opportunity to tighten their grip on first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Fans set to camp out for Cal Bears big game
item.description: (KRON) – It will be a busy weekend for the City of Berkeley as the Cal Bears football team is hosting a college game day show for the first time in over 30 years. The Bears are currently (3-1) and are looking to knock off the eighth-seed and undefeated Miami Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4
